statement: The operator reviewed and explicitly authorized merging the exact substantive Lab PR #111 content at commit 4d9fc59c30fb372b6a4cb39413f3b716a571a4cb. That content removes the duplicate operational Lab board files and retains a short pointer to the live public board in Natoshi-moto/Experimental-Sandbox. This authorization permits only merge-authorization bookkeeping after the authorized content commit.
non_claims: This authorization covers only the exact substantive content commit 4d9fc59c30fb372b6a4cb39413f3b716a571a4cb; any later substantive change requires new operator authorization.
This does not certify the PR content is correct, safe, secure, private, or complete.
This does not authorize any change outside operations/merge_authorizations/ after the authorized substantive commit.
This does not authorize any other pull request, branch, repository, setting, deletion, promotion, dependency change, or Hermes action.
